title: Pilosella micromegas
taxonomy: Pilosella micromegas is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Pilosella, which is a group of plants that are closely related to the genus Hieracium. The genus Pilosella is further divided into several sections, with Pilosella micromegas being part of the section Pilosella. This species is native to certain regions in Europe and is often found growing in mountainous areas. Pilosella micromegas is also known as a type of hawkweed due to its similarity in appearance to other species in the Hieracium genus.
